name: Maura O'Connell
abstract: Maura O'Connell (born 16 September 1958) is an Irish singer. She is known for her contemporary interpretations of Irish folk songs, strongly influenced by American country music.

about_quotes.speaker: Jane Monheit
about_quotes.evidence: One of my favorite singers on the planet is Maura O’Connell... And she was a big influence on me as a singer.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jane Monheit interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, August 20, 2010
